bottom_line: Implementation was correct; the real cost was Docker/testcontainer port exhaustion causing non-deterministic QV gate failures. Fix the test-assertions tool to honour noqa suppression comments, and disable Ryuk in test-unit/test-integration to prevent Docker port exhaustion.
coverage_notes: All step logs read in full (all < 1 MB except S10 run logs at 454-808 KB which were read completely). DB telemetry confirmed step durations and completion order. S01 report (ai-dev/active/I-00121/reports/I-00121_S01_Backend_report.md) used for TDD RED evidence confirmation.

findings.title: test-assertions QV gate fires on suppressed-pattern tests at first run
findings.recommendation: Change scripts/check_test_assertions.py to honour noqa PT018 suppression comments in source before emitting failures, OR add a project-level config that marks test_test_runner_allure_env.py as a known-ok file for PT018.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/I-00121_S09_run1.log:1 — 'tests/unit/test_test_runner_allure_env.py:24: tautology: every assert matches a tautological form' (5 tests flagged, all with # noqa: PT018 in source)
scripts/check_test_assertions.py:45 — tool flags PT018 before reading noqa suppression
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Fix test-assertions QV gate to honour noqa PT018 suppression comments in source — analyzed in I-00121 (see ai-dev/active/I-00121/reports/I-00121_self_assess_report.md). Target: scripts/check_test_assertions.py. Effort: M.

findings.title: S10 make test-unit non-deterministically flaky due to Docker port exhaustion
findings.recommendation: Add TESTCONTAINERS_RYUK_DISABLED=true to the Makefile's test-unit environment. Document in docs/IW_AI_Core_Testing_Strategy.md that this variable should be set host-wide or in .env. Ryuk cleanup container consumes ports needed by concurrent testcontainers.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/I-00121_S10_run4.log:1 — 'docker.errors.APIError: 500 Server Error ... failed to bind host port 0.0.0.0:44273/tcp: address already in use'
ai-dev/logs/I-00121_S10_run6.log:1 — 'failed to bind host port 0.0.0.0:44433/tcp: address already in use'
ai-dev/logs/I-00121_S10_run10.log:1 — '63 errors' (worst case, all docker port exhaustion)
ai-dev/logs/I-00121_S10_run13.log:1 — 'testcontainers-ryuk: failed to bind host port 0.0.0.0:46402/tcp'
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add TESTCONTAINERS_RYUK_DISABLED=true to Makefile test-unit/test-integration targets to fix Docker port exhaustion flakiness — analyzed in I-00121 (see ai-dev/active/I-00121/reports/I-00121_self_assess_report.md). Target: Makefile. Effort: S.

findings.title: S11 make test-integration same Docker port exhaustion as S10
findings.recommendation: Same as F2 — disable Ryuk in test-integration environment. Fixes both S10 and S11 simultaneously.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/I-00121_S11_run1.log:1 — 'psycopg.OperationalError: connection failed: FATAL: database iwcore_template_tdzhjoecyeibvnnm does not exist' (testcontainer never started)
ai-dev/logs/I-00121_S11_run1.log:48 — '48 ERRORs' from testcontainers fixtures failing to start (same port-exhaustion root cause)
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add TESTCONTAINERS_RYUK_DISABLED=true to Makefile test-integration target — analyzed in I-00121 (see ai-dev/active/I-00121/reports/I-00121_self_assess_report.md). Target: Makefile. Effort: S.

findings.title: S06-S08 QV gates each ran 6 times despite passing on run 1
findings.recommendation: Investigate why QV gates that pass on run 1 are re-triggered 5 more times. Likely race condition in step completion tracking — check orch/daemon/ worktree_executor.py or step-tracking logic for commit visibility issue.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/I-00121_S06_run2.log through run6.log — all 5 subsequent runs also passed but were still recorded (runs 2-6 identical to run 1)
Same pattern for S07 and S08
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Investigate QV gate re-trigger loop — S06/S07/S08 passed run1 but ran 5 more times each — analyzed in I-00121 (see ai-dev/active/I-00121/reports/I-00121_self_assess_report.md). Target: orch/daemon/. Effort: M.

findings.title: S03 wrote test files that required multiple S02 review cycles to stabilise
findings.recommendation: Add a checklist item to the Tests step prompt requiring the agent to confirm no git stash is left in the worktree before declaring the step complete.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/I-00121_S02_run1.log:1 — S02 run 1 flagged git stash concern (stale pre-commit implementation)
ai-dev/logs/I-00121_S02_run2.log:1 — S02 run 2 was a re-run with no code change
ai-dev/logs/I-00121_S02_run5.log — 5 total runs to reach stable PASS
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add git stash check to Tests step prompt template — analyzed in I-00121 (see ai-dev/active/I-00121/reports/I-00121_self_assess_report.md). Target: ai-dev/templates/Issue_Test_Template.md. Effort: S.
